posts.hook: the ai spending bill arrived at google and tesla on the same day
posts.caption: google and tesla both posted negative free cash flow for the first time in years as ai spending bites, openai staff were reportedly freaked out by last week's hugging face breach, and about 200 startups including y combinator asked trump not to ban chinese open-weight ai. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: google posted its first negative free cash flow since going public
slides.desc: cloud backlog hit $514 billion as 2026 capex guidance rose to $195-205 billion

slides.title: tesla logged its first negative free cash flow in over two years
slides.desc: ai and robotics spending squeezed profits even as revenue grew 25%

slides.title: openai staff were reportedly freaked out by the hugging face breach
slides.desc: the ft traces it partly to aggressive training methods aimed at anthropic

slides.title: anthropic shipped a tool that catches bugs before you commit
slides.desc: a claude code plugin scans staged changes or your whole codebase

slides.title: about 200 startups including y combinator asked trump not to ban chinese ai
slides.desc: the coalition argues a ban would hurt us startups more than it slows beijing

slides.title: a new open source tokenizer claims 1000x hugging face's speed
slides.desc: simd-optimized regex pretokenization hits 24 gb per second on one cpu

posts.hook: congress wants an ai kill switch, three days after openai needed one
posts.caption: lawmakers introduced a bill letting dhs shut down dangerous ai models, google got hit with a $1 billion eu fine hours after its first-ever negative cash flow, and deepseek's founder said nvidia's cuda moat is disintegrating. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: lawmakers introduce the ai kill switch act
slides.desc: dhs could order any ai company to shut down or slow a dangerous model

terms.gloss: the us department of homeland security

slides.title: the eu fined google $1 billion for breaking antitrust rules
slides.desc: search self-preferencing and play store payment steering both drew penalties

slides.title: deepseek's founder says nvidia's cuda moat is disintegrating
slides.desc: in a leaked investor talk, liang wenfeng calls compute the real us-china gap

terms.gloss: nvidia's software platform that locks developers into its chips

slides.title: google's own data says ai use is still shallow at work
slides.desc: a study of millions of ai chats finds it helping workers, not replacing them

slides.title: ibm is buying a quantum lab from boeing and gm
slides.desc: hrl laboratories built electron-spin circuits ibm wants in its own machines

slides.title: ai chip startup etched raised $300 million at a $10.3 billion valuation
slides.desc: the round lands inside a year where over half of us startup funding is billion-dollar rounds

slides.title: gemini found 55 bugs a claude-based scanner missed
slides.desc: google deepmind's cyber model shipped days after anthropic's own vulnerability scanner
